name: arm-mcp-gemini
description: Gemini CLI extension that adds the Arm MCP Server plus /arm-migration, /arm-hotspots-optimization, /arm-full-optimization, and /arm-vs-x86-performance-comparison workflow commands.

settings.name: Project Directory
settings.description: Absolute host path to the root directory of the project code you want mounted into the Arm MCP Server for running code scan.

settings.name: Arm Performix SSH Private Key
settings.description: Absolute host path to the SSH private key file used to SSH into the target instance for Arm Performix profiling.

settings.name: Arm Performix SSH Known Hosts
settings.description: Absolute host path to the known_hosts file used when SSHing into the target instance for Arm Performix profiling.
